{{Quote|Let me extend a warm welcome to all of you this beautiful evening. My name is Eban Trey, and I will be your host for the tonight's festivities.|Eban Trey|<ref name="Ruins" />}}
'''Eban Trey''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who was the host of the [[Aerie Casino opening|grand opening]] of the [[Aerie Casino]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. He announced the upcoming opening event, a competition between trained exotic animals held at an arena near the [[Casino/Legends|casino]], and also proclaimed that the first one hundred attendees who entered the casino after its subsequent official opening would be rewarded with one hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], an announcement that the audience received with great enthusiasm.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Let me be the first to welcome you to the finest gambling establishment of the Mid Rim: the Aerie Casino. To launch the official, grand opening of the casino, we have a night of extraordinary events for your entertainment.|Eban Trey|<ref name="Ruins" />}}
[[File:DusqueMistflier.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The bioengineer Dusque Mistflier was not surprised at the announcer Eban Trey being a Rodian.]]
Eban Trey was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who carried out the duties of a host at the [[Aerie Casino opening|grand opening]] of the [[Aerie Casino]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="Ruins" /> in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].<ref name="1 ABY">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' to [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].</ref> At an arena set up near the [[Casino/Legends|casino]], the opening event of that [[Local day/Legends|night's]] program was scheduled to be a combat competition between trained exotic animals, and Trey entered the center of the arena in order to announce the event. As he was doing so, the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineer]] [[Tendau Nandon]], who was attending the opening event along with his colleague, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Dusque Mistflier]], pointed at Trey while noting to her that the event was about to begin. Upon noticing that the announcer was a Rodian, Mistflier was not surprised due to a significant number of members of his [[Species/Legends|species]] having a reputation for being highly accomplished [[Author/Legends|dramatists]].<ref name="Ruins" />

Clearing his [[Mouth/Legends|throat]], Trey then addressed the audience, welcoming them to the festivities and declaring the Aerie Casino to be the "finest gambling establishment of the Mid Rim." The Rodian briefly described the upcoming competition and finally announced that after the contest's end the casino would be officially opened, with one hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] being given out to the first one hundred attendees to enter the establishment. The audience reacted wildly to the announcement, and Trey bowed and dashed out of the arena, after which the competing animals of the contest were led on a parade through the arena by their trainers and handlers<ref name="Ruins" />

==Personality and traits==
Eban Trey had a slight build and [[Color/Legends|green]] skin.<ref name="Ruins" />

==Skills and abilities==
In Dusque Mistflier's view, Eban Trey was a master of timing. In his speech during the opening ceremony of the Aerie Casino, he utilized dramatic gestures.<ref name="Ruins" />

==Equipment==
Eban Trey wore a garish [[Robe/Legends|robe]] with a [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]] to which a small audio [[Transmitter/Legends|transmitter]] was attached for the purpose of enhancing the volume of his speech.<ref name="Ruins" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I would like to thank Eban Trey, my favorite Rodian, for showing me around the galaxy, and my husband, Roderic, my favorite test player.|Voronica Whitney-Robinson|<ref name="Ruins" />}}
Eban Trey appeared in [[Voronica Whitney-Robinson]] and [[W. Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman's]] [[2003]] novel ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''. In the book's acknowledgements, Whitney-Robinson thanked a Rodian character also named "Eban Trey."<ref name="Ruins" />
